title: Inbound Create Note (post, reply, mention, DM)
description: Handle inbound Create{Note} activities. Parse the Note into a remote_posts row. If the Note mentions a local actor, create a notification row. If it is a reply to a local post, link via in_reply_to_id and create a mention notification. If visibility is direct and addressed to a local actor, create a direct notification. Handle unknown object types (Question, Page) gracefully without 500.
design: visibility mapping: to contains AS2 Public → public. to contains followers URL → unlisted or private. only addressed to specific actors → direct. Parse mentions from tag[] array where type=Mention. Parse hashtags from tag[] where type=Hashtag. Store in remote_posts. Resolve Announce object if URI (may need fetch).
acceptance_criteria: Remote post appears in correct timeline and cache; mention of local actor creates notification; reply to local post links correctly; direct message (visibility=direct addressed to local actor) creates notification; Lemmy Page type is ignored without 500; Create for post already in remote_posts is idempotent
